channel.title: Blowfish on Built by Nikhil
channel.description: Recent content in Blowfish on Built by Nikhil

item.title: SEO Optimizations for a Hugo Site on Cloudflare
item.description: A practical checklist for SEO on a Hugo site with the Blowfish theme hosted on Cloudflare — from meta tags and structured data to Google Search Console and Cloudflare caching.
